sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id UInt32, date_value String, precision UInt8) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT id, toDateTime64OrDefault(date_value, precision) AS converted_date FROM test_dates;
CREATE TABLE test_arrays (id UInt32, date_list Array(String), precision UInt8, default_value DateTime64) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT id, arrayMap(x -> toDateTime64OrDefault(x, precision, 'UTC', default_value), date_list) AS converted_dates FROM test_arrays;

SELECT a.id, count(*) as valid_dates_count FROM test_dates a JOIN test_arrays b ON toDateTime64OrDefault(b.date_list[1], b.precision) = toDateTime64OrDefault(a.date_value, a.precision) GROUP BY a.id HAVING valid_dates_count > 0;
SELECT id, toDateTime64OrDefault(date_value, precision, 'UTC', toDateTime64('2001-01-01 00:00:00.00', 3)) AS custom_default FROM test_dates ORDER BY custom_default;
SELECT id, countIf(toDateTime64OrDefault(date_value, precision) IS NULL) AS null_count FROM test_dates GROUP BY id HAVING null_count > 0;
